mapper.sql: select id, request_url, request_method, request_params, response_result, sql_statements, trace_id, operator, operate_time, cost_millis, status, error_msg from crm_oper_log
mapper.select:
AND operator like concat(concat('%', #{operator}), '%')
AND request_url like concat(concat('%', #{requestUrl}), '%')
AND operate_time >= to_date(#{params.beginTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND operate_time <= to_date(#{params.endTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
order by id desc
select count(1) from crm_oper_log where trunc(operate_time) = trunc(sysdate)
select count(1) from crm_oper_log where trunc(operate_time) = trunc(sysdate) - 1
select count(1) from crm_oper_log where trunc(operate_time) = trunc(sysdate) and status = '1'

select * from ( select operator as "name", count(1) as "value" from crm_oper_log where trunc(operate_time) = trunc(sysdate) and operator is not null group by operator order by value desc ) where rownum <= 5

select module_name as "name", cnt as "value" from ( select case when request_url like '%/crm/customer%' then '客户管理' when request_url like '%/crm/opportunity%' then '商机管理' when request_url like '%/crm/contract%' then '合同管理' when request_url like '%/crm/workflow%' then '工作流' when request_url like '%/crm/contact%' then '联系人' else '其他' end as module_name, count(1) as cnt from crm_oper_log where trunc(operate_time) = trunc(sysdate) group by case when request_url like '%/crm/customer%' then '客户管理' when request_url like '%/crm/opportunity%' then '商机管理' when request_url like '%/crm/contract%' then '合同管理' when request_url like '%/crm/workflow%' then '工作流' when request_url like '%/crm/contact%' then '联系人' else '其他' end )
